\ud83d\udcca SYSTEM_CLARIFICATIONS.batch_vs_category: BATCH (supplier_extraction_batch_size=3) processes 3 categories simultaneously using sequential tab reuse due to browser manager's 1-tab limit. CATEGORY (max_products_per_category=4) limits individual category extraction to 4 products each.
\ud83d\udcca SYSTEM_CLARIFICATIONS.max_products_per_cycle: Controls Amazon analysis batching - processes products in groups before triggering financial reports and state saves. Does NOT affect supplier scraping phase.
\ud83d\udcca SYSTEM_CLARIFICATIONS.star_wars_fixed: FIXED: performance.matching_thresholds now integrated with configurable 0.25/0.5/0.75 thresholds preventing weak Amazon matches.
